role_description: Intelligent request routing and lane assignment
purpose: Route requests to correct lane or subsystem based on task profile, risk tier, and constitutional constraints. The Kernel is the central nervous system of arifOS.
when_to_use: Unsure which tool or lane is appropriate
Need system status or health check
when_not_to_use: Do not use when you already know the specific tool needed
Do not use as a pass-through for every call - adds overhead
Do not use to bypass governance stages
Do not use if direct tool call is obvious
not_job: Not a reasoning engine - delegates to mind
Not a safety evaluator - delegates to heart
Not an execution mechanism - delegates to forge
Not a decision maker - prepares for judge

mode.description: kernel: route request, status: system health

required_payload.query: string - What needs to be done

chatgpt_guidance.plain_english: Use this when unsure where to start or when you need the system's help figuring out the right approach. It's like asking 'what should I do?'
ask_before_use_if: you're unsure of the right tool sequence
do_not_assume: routing is always optimal - you can override
kernel makes final decisions - it only routes
every call needs routing - direct calls are fine

ideal_prompt_shape.query: I need to audit this Python application for security issues
